    "Response contains only 3 tips instead of 10 sentences as requested.",
    "Content is relevant but insufficiently developed."

  "corrections": [
    "i -> I (Register; A1; Low)",
    "simular -> similar (Spelling; A1; Low)",
    "Here is the tips -> Here are the tips (Grammar; B1; Medium)",
    "spend a lot of time to -> spend a lot of time on (Grammar; B1; Medium)",
    "leave from useless groups -> leave those groups (Grammar; B1; Medium)",
    "at VK -> on VK (Grammar; B1; Low)",
    "enought -> enough (Spelling; A1; Low)",
    "I hope, my -> I hope my (Punctuation; A1; Medium)",
    "write me at personal messages -> message me (Grammar; B1; Medium)"
  ],
  "errors_by_category": {
    "Lexis": [],
    "Grammar": [
      {
        "excerpt": "Here is the tips",
        "correction": "Here are the tips",
        "comment": "Subject-verb agreement error (tips = plural)",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "spend a lot of time to",
        "correction": "spend a lot of time on",
        "comment": "Preposition error (spend time on something)",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "leave from useless groups",
        "correction": "leave those groups",
        "comment": "Unnatural phrasing; 'leave from' is incorrect",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "write me at personal messages",
        "correction": "message me",
        "comment": "Unnatural phrasing; 'write me at' is incorrect",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      }
    ],
    "Punctuation": [
      {
        "excerpt": "I hope, my",
        "correction": "I hope my",
        "comment": "Comma splice; unnecessary comma",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A1"
      }
    ],
    "Word order": [],
    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [
      {
        "excerpt": "Hi, i had a simular problem. Here is the tips that helped me.\n1) Manage your time! Use special apps and calendars. You can find this apps at Play Market.\n\n2) Don't spend a lot of time to TV and social media. You should leave from useless groups at VK, don't watch YouTube a lot!\n\n3) Sleep more than 8 hours and eat good food. It will bring you enought energy.\n\nI hope, my tips will help you. For more information, you can write me at personal messages.",
        "correction": "Functional structure with clear sections",
        "comment": "Clear paragraphing and logical flow",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      }
    ],
    "Discourse markers": [],
    "Rhetorical features": [],
    "Register": [
      {
        "excerpt": "i",
        "correction": "I",
        "comment": "Lowercase first-person pronoun in formal context",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "A1"
      }
    ],
    "Incomprehensibility": []
  },
  "strengths": [],
  "feedback": "Level B1: Basic sentence structures and vocabulary dominate. Key issues include preposition errors, subject-verb agreement, and spelling mistakes. Text organization is functional but task requirements (10 sentences) are unmet. Grammar accuracy needs improvement.",
  "next_steps": [
    "Practice preposition usage (spend time on, leave groups)",
    "Improve subject-verb agreement (tips = are)",
    "Expand responses to meet required length"
  ]
}
